data.title: Bitcoin stuck in $55K-$79K range as spot selling rises & ETF demand falls, per Glassnode.
data.description: According to Glassnode analysis, Bitcoin is currently fluctuating between the True Market Mean at $79,000 and the Realized Price at $55,000. This situation is exacerbated by the diminishing demand for ETFs and the escalating selling pressure in the spot market.

data.title: Fidium unveils new fiber plans up to 8 Gig with WiFi 7 for high-speed connectivity on all devices.速.
data.description: In Texas, Fidium unveiled a significant expansion of its fiber-to-the-premise network services, now offering 5 Gig and up to 8 Gig symmetrical speed tiers. The introduction includes advanced WiFi 7 tech, guaranteeing multi-gig performance throughout all connected devices in customers' homes. Fidium has elevated its maximum home internet speeds from 2 Gig to a maximum of 8 Gig, marking a quadrupling increase in peak speeds.

data.title: World Liberty Financial partners with Apex Group, handling $3.5 trillion assets, to integrate USD1 stablecoin in their ecosystem.
data.description: In Palm Beach, Florida, World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has revealed a new partnership with Apex Group Ltd., a prominent global financial services company operating in 52 countries and managing more than $3.5 trillion in assets. This collaboration aims to incorporate WLFI's stablecoin valued at USD1 into Apex Group's extensive ecosystem. The stablecoin will be utilized for activities such as subscriptions, distributions, and redemptions of tokenized assets within the platform. The primary goal of this partnership is to introduce regulated stablecoin infrastructure into conventional financial operations.

data.title: Datadog announces DASH 2026 conference in NYC on June 9-10 focusing on AI observability & security at scale.
data.description: On June 9 and 10, the premier conference will be held in New York City, focusing on AI observability and security at scale. The event will showcase real-world customer use cases, highlighting the importance of these aspects in the AI industry. Attendees can expect to gain insights and knowledge from a range of experts and professionals in the field.

data.title: TIPS completes phase I of decentralized deployment for Depinfer with graduation of DEPIN token.
data.description: Tianrong Internet Products and Services Inc., also known as TIPS, has recently disclosed the completion of the graduation process for the DEPIN token developed for Depinfer. This event marks a significant milestone for the company as they successfully navigated the token creation and implementation for their client. The DEPIN token is designed to serve a specific function within the Depinfer platform. This achievement underscores TIPS' expertise and capabilities in the blockchain and tokenization space. The completion of the DEPIN token signifies a crucial advancement for both TIPS and Depinfer, paving the way for further innovative solutions in the digital assets realm.
